title: Test Automation Engineer
description: Elastic is seeking a Test Automation Engineer to ensure quality across our search and analytics platform. Working remotely from New York, you'll design test frameworks, build automation, and catch bugs before they reach production. You'll collaborate with product and engineering teams to maintain the high standards our users depend on.
responsibilities: Design and implement automated test frameworks for web, API, and backend components
Create comprehensive test cases and automation scripts using modern testing tools and languages
Identify gaps in test coverage and recommend improvements to testing strategy
Work with development teams to understand features and requirements before implementation
Monitor test metrics and quality indicators; report findings and recommend process improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
